# La Pong 2d - A simple pong game made with Godot Engine 4.6.1

## General rules
- Windows is default system for development
- Godot Engine 4.6.1 is the game engine used for development (Godot_v4.6.1-stable_win64.exe)
- main programming language is GDScript

## Project structure
- `assets/`: Contains all game assets such as sprites, sounds, and music.
- `scenes/`: Contains all the Godot scene files (.tscn) for the game.
- `scripts/`: Contains all the GDScript files for game logic.
- `_export/`: Contains exported builds of the game (ignored in version control).
